free_text: Analyzing powers and differential cross sections of
Rolled thin 6Li foils with areal density 2.78 mg/cm2.
Data tables received from R.J. Slobodrian, 13 April
The data given differs drastically from the data
presented in Fig. 3 of reference, but is the correct
cross section according to R. Slobodrian.
